A_executive_summary: Dataset size: 54 sessions and 87 user messages.
Top demand category by message volume: 'other' (58 msgs, 66.7%).
Conversion signal: 0/6 product_discovery sessions later reach buy_intent/where_to_buy (0.0%).
Friction signal: 4 'stuck sessions' found (top 10 listed by repeat count).
Quality signal: 15 sessions are in the dataset’s bottom-quartile min_score (top 25 listed).
B_insights_and_recommendations: Prioritize content and quick-replies for the top categories by volume: other (58), product_discovery (13), lawn (8).

Turn the most repeated questions into: (1) homepage FAQ tiles, (2) chatbot 'suggested questions', and (3) single-scan answer cards. Top repeats include: 'can you show me the different lawn mix you have'(12), 'i’m growing chillies on my apartment balcony in perth, they get 2 hours of sun, wind hits hard, and i forget to water. what single change will help the most?'(4), 'i’m new to gardening — what’s the best fertiliser for vegetables in perth?'(3).
Add a guided flow inside product_discovery that explicitly offers: 'Compare options' → 'Recommended product' → 'Where to buy' CTA, because only 0 of 6 PD sessions show a later intent/WTB signal.
Investigate the top 'stuck sessions' and patch gaps where the bot likely failed to resolve the question (same normalized text repeated). Highest repeat count observed in top 10: 4.

Reduce loops in category 'other' (highest repeated-question instances: 20) by: adding disambiguation questions, showing 2–3 options, and confirming the user’s context (plant type, area, problem symptoms).
Review low-score sessions (bottom-quartile min_score) to find failure modes (missing rules, ambiguous categories, weak normalization). Lowest min_score in sample: 0.352.
Use hourly volume to schedule support coverage and time-sensitive nudges (e.g., 'Where to buy' prompts during peak hours).
Note: dataset is small, so treat percentages as directional; focus on repeated questions and stuck sessions first (they’re robust even on small samples).

C_chart_plan.title: Top 'Stuck Sessions' by Max Repeat Count
C_chart_plan.notes: A stuck session has the same normalized text repeated >=2 times within the session.

C_chart_plan.notes: Multi-series line (or stacked area) for top categories; group long tail into 'Other' if needed.
